creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

by adding package openbox (pkg_add -r openbox) the
installed openbox is kinda broken, it does not display
icons on the menu (they are configured) it does not
handle well the screen size of the second larger monitor,
but when I remove that package and built openbox from
Ports, icons work and screen size detection (for
maximize for example) works ok.

I recall there was similar issue with sysutils/screen
where the built package would end up broken and it had
to built on every system.

Regards,
vermaden
